t.t: Track sample status and view released reports
Submit test requests and track request lifecycle
Check invoice balances and submit payment references
Professional customers create lab service purchase orders
Track handover and receive session progress
Follow investigation, CAPA and closure status

t.div: This report is withdrawn and currently unavailable for external access.
This report is withdrawn and currently unavailable for external access.

div.div: AI interpretation is currently under internal review and not published yet.
This AI interpretation is for informational reference only, not a medical diagnosis.

div.label: I confirm receipt of this report and agree to record my acknowledgement.

t.p: Track dispatch, receive sessions, discrepancies and related investigations.

t.div: Please select at least one service.
Please select at least one profile.
Please add at least one specimen with selected tests.
Selected physician does not match the selected department.

div.label: Physician
div.small: Physician is managed in laboratory backend.

div.label: Line Note (applies if line has no specific note)

t.div: Payment amount must be greater than 0.
Current invoice state does not allow payment submission.

t.p: Professional customers (institution/hospital/doctor) can create service purchase orders here.

t.div: Please select a valid professional test product.
